id: # SECTION 1: ORIENTATION — "Where am I? What do I have?"

what project is configured for this repo?

expected_behavior: Complete by name — needs search first

let the team know we're deploying at 3pm

expected_behavior: Must reply to parent not comment

download that file to my downloads folder
schedule a "Team Sync" meeting for tomorrow 10-11am
add "Launch Day" as an all-day event

id: # SECTION 16: OUTPUT VARIATIONS — Same query different formats

natural_language_query: just the raw data for projects
just give me the todo IDs

id: # SECTION 17: AMBIGUOUS / VAGUE QUERIES — Real-world messiness

expected_behavior: Should check config or ask for project, not error silently

cli_command: basecamp recordings todos --json vs basecamp reports assigned --json
natural_language_query: show me all my todos everywhere
expected_behavior: Should use reports assigned not recordings (recordings has no assignee data)

natural_language_query: show me tasks on the board

expected_behavior: User says "tasks" — could mean todos or cards, should clarify or default to todos

natural_language_query: write a message to the team

expected_behavior: Bare word — should use configured project

natural_language_query: create a todo and assign it to me
find the coffee todo and mark it done
give me a summary of what happened today
reply to this basecamp link with "Thanks!"

expected_behavior: Should ask which card table or show hint
